test.name: Login kryptatuilla tunnuksilla

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\reett\\Documents\\webkehitys_m\\browser\\traces\\temp\\8c5e30c8-d07d-4f11-ae11-19732f7a9b62"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:5173/login.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '***' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Secret
kw.doc: Types the given secret from ``variable_name`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.status: ValueError: Direct assignment of values or variables as 'secret' is not allowed. Use special variable syntax ($var instead of ${var}) to prevent variable values from being spoiled.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

test.status: ValueError: Direct assignment of values or variables as 'secret' is not allowed. Use special variable syntax ($var instead of ${var}) to prevent variable values from being spoiled.
